info.name: Notification Service API
info.description:
Full API collection for the RDCPASS Notification Service (SMSC).

**Flow:**
1. Register App → saves `app_id` + `secret_key` (sender_id: RDCPASS)
2. Create Session → saves `session_token` (5 min TTL)
3. Send OTP → verify with code from SMS
4. Send SMS / Email / APNS with Bearer token

**SMS providers:** Primary/fallback via `DEFAULT_SMS_PROVIDER` (`aws` or `brevo`). Brevo IDs appear as `brevo:{messageId}` in `provider_message_id`.

**Email:** SMTP relay via Brevo (`SMTP_HOST`, `SMTP_LOGIN`, `SMTP_PASSWORD`). Plain text at `/api/email/send`, HTML at `/api/email/send/html` (multipart/alternative).

**OTP:** Code length and SMS language are server-side (`OTP_DIGITS`, `OTP_LANG`). Codes are stored in **Redis** (not Postgres). Default: 8 digits, French SMS.

**Modes:**
- **Sync** — waits for delivery, returns final result
- **Async** — returns `status: pending`, webhook receives final result

**Auth:** Notification endpoints require `Authorization: Bearer {{session_token}}`

Import `Notification-Service.postman_environment.json` alongside this collection. Use **Workflow (Run in order)** for end-to-end testing.

exec: // Requests under 'Apps' and 'Auth > Create Session' override auth to 'noauth'

request.description: Check service health. No authentication required.

header.description: Required only if ADMIN_API_KEY is set on server

request.description: Register a third-party application. Returns `app_id` (plaintext) and `secret_key` (shown once). Sender ID is applied automatically on all SMS/OTP sends.

response.name: 200 Created
response.body:
{
  "app_id": "app_kMDJlWrWt0idfuzRUSpnOTww",
  "secret_key": "iipAs95Cow7m8DuKfqT92im08hH4tLze7fyRo8lBzS9Fd30ZEQRw7Eql7okgaMWA",
  "application": "RDCPASS Test App",
  "contact_email": "admin@example.com",
  "sender_id": "RDCPASS",
  "webhook_url": "https://example.com/webhook",
  "message": "Store the secret_key securely. It will not be shown again."
}

response.name: 401 Unauthorized (admin key)
response.body: Invalid or missing admin API key

request.description: Exchange app_id + secret_key for a short-lived session token (default 5 min). Required before any SMS/OTP/APNS call.
Send SMS synchronously via primary provider (AWS SNS or Brevo per DEFAULT_SMS_PROVIDER), with automatic fallback. Sender ID applied from registered app.

response.name: 400 Failed
response.body:
{
  "request_id": "aec3a1ee-1131-44ce-8ed2-8f64338fd94e",
  "app_id": "app_kMDJlWrWt0idfuzRUSpnOTww",
  "notification_type": "sms",
  "status": "failed",
  "created_at": "2026-06-10T02:27:28.365156+00:00",
  "completed_at": "2026-06-10T02:27:29.583459+00:00",
  "time": "2026-06-10T02:27:28.365168+00:00",
  "client_ip": "127.0.0.1",
  "sender_id": "RDCPASS",
  "provider_message_id": null,
  "error_message": "Phone number must be in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567)"
}

request.description: Accept SMS request and process in background. Returns 202 with `status: pending`. Final result POSTed to app webhook_url.
Send plain-text email synchronously via SMTP (Brevo relay). Optional `reply_to` address supported.
Send HTML email synchronously (multipart/alternative with plain-text fallback). Optional `reply_to` address supported.
Accept plain-text email and process in background. Returns 202 with `status: pending`. Final result POSTed to app webhook_url.
Accept HTML email and process in background. Returns 202 with `status: pending`.
Send OTP via SMS synchronously. Code length set by server OTP_DIGITS (env: {{otp_digits}}). SMS language set by OTP_LANG (env: {{otp_lang}}). Code stored in Redis.

response.name: 429 Throttled
response.body:
{
  "request_id": "aec3a1ee-1131-44ce-8ed2-8f64338fd94e",
  "app_id": "app_kMDJlWrWt0idfuzRUSpnOTww",
  "notification_type": "otp_send",
  "status": "failed",
  "created_at": "2026-06-10T02:27:28.365156+00:00",
  "completed_at": "2026-06-10T02:27:29.583459+00:00",
  "time": "2026-06-10T02:27:28.365168+00:00",
  "client_ip": "127.0.0.1",
  "sender_id": "RDCPASS",
  "provider_message_id": null,
  "error_message": "Too many OTP requests for this phone number. Try again later."
}

request.description: Accept OTP send request and process in background.
Verify OTP synchronously. Code must match OTP_DIGITS length ({{otp_digits}}). Returns request_id, status (verified/failed), signature.
Accept OTP verification and process in background. Returns 202 with status pending + signature. Webhook receives verified/failed when complete.
Send Apple push notification synchronously via .p12 certificate.
Accept APNS request and process in background.
Poll status of any async request. Returns NotificationResponse for SMS/Email/OTP send/APNS, or OtpVerifyResponse for OTP verify.

item.name: Workflow (Run in order)
item.description:
Run these 6 requests in order for full smoke test:
1. Register Application (sender_id: RDCPASS)
2. Create Session
3. Send OTP — check SMS (French if OTP_LANG=fr, {{otp_digits}} digits)
4. Verify OTP — set `otp_code` env var first
5. Send SMS
6. Send Email — set `email_to` env var; requires SMTP configured on server

Requires Redis for OTP. Set `admin_api_key` if ADMIN_API_KEY is configured on server.
